comment: Discover-only schema. Intentionally different from tools.manifest.json.

entries.label: Seller disclosure
entries.when_to_use: Structure, systems, claims, easements, and disclosure-driven leverage.

entries.label: HOA packet
entries.when_to_use: Dues, assessments, STR limits, and HOA constraints affecting value.

entries.label: Preliminary title
entries.when_to_use: Liens, exceptions, easements, and chain-of-title concerns.

entries.label: Inspection report
entries.when_to_use: Condition issues, repair estimates, safety risks, and credits.

entries.label: Tax history
entries.when_to_use: Assessment trend, tax burden, and carrying-cost arguments.

entries.label: Comparable sales
entries.when_to_use: Anchoring valuation and challenging asking price with market evidence.

entries.label: Schools snapshot
entries.when_to_use: Starter/free tool for assignment, rezoning, and buyer demand signals.

entries.label: Utilities and energy
entries.when_to_use: Operating costs and monthly budget pressure.

entries.label: Permits and renovations
entries.when_to_use: Renovation quality, open permits, and compliance risks.
